parameters.jsCode:
const date = new Date();
const publishedAt = date.toISOString();
const compactDate = publishedAt.slice(0, 10);
const topicSeed = ($json.headlineHints?.[0] ?? $json.categoryLabel ?? $json.category)
  .toLowerCase()
  .replace(/[^a-z0-9-]+/gi, '-')
  .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
  .slice(0, 24) || 'daily-update';

const prompt = [
  'You are writing a compact Japanese news-board article for tomo-channel.',
  'Return JSON only. Do not add facts that are not supported by the sources.',
  'Keep the tone calm, readable, and forum-summary-like.',
  'Do not imitate real forum users or real journalists.',
  'Do not use harsh or sensational language.',
  'Category must be one of: world, japan, it-trend.',
  `Slug prefix: ${$json.slugPrefix}`,
  `Date: ${compactDate}`,
  `Sources: ${JSON.stringify($json.parsedSources)}`,
  `Feed hints: ${JSON.stringify($json.headlineHints ?? [])}`,
  '',
  'Required output schema:',
  '{',
  '  "slug": "...",',
  '  "title": "...",',
  '  "category": "world | japan | it-trend",',
  '  "publishedAt": "...",',
  '  "summaryLines": ["...", "...", "..."],',
  '  "bodyLines": ["...", "..."],',
  '  "whyItMatters": "...",',
  '  "tomoPoint": "...",',
  '  "thumbnailUrl": "...",',
  '  "tags": ["..."],',
  '  "sources": [{ "label": "...", "url": "..." }],',
  '  "initialEditorComment": {',
  '    "bodyLines": ["..."],',
  '    "authorName": "editor",',
  '    "shortId": "editor"',
  '  }',
  '}',
  '',
  'Safety rules:',
  '- Use only the provided sources.',
  '- Do not speculate.',
  '- Do not write defamation or discrimination.',
  '- Be especially careful with politics, disasters, medicine, and finance.',
  '- Keep jokes light and do not distort the facts.',
  '- Slug must be lowercase ASCII letters, numbers, and hyphens only.',
  `Recommended slug pattern: ${$json.slugPrefix}${topicSeed}`
].join('\n');

return [
  {
    json: {
      ...$json,
      publishedAt,
      prompt,
      openAiRequest: {
        model: 'gpt-5.4-mini',
        messages: [
          {
            role: 'system',
            content: 'You are writing a short news-board article for tomo-channel. Return JSON only. Use only the provided sources. Keep it factual and concise.'
          },
          {
            role: 'user',
            content: prompt
          }
        ],
        temperature: 0.5,
        response_format: {
          type: 'json_object'
        }
      }
    }
  }
];
